text:
Movies: Star Wars: The Force Awakens, Jurassic World, Mad Max: Fury Road.
Books: The Girl on the Train (Paula Hawkins), Go Set a Watchman (Harper Lee), Between the World and Me (Ta-Nehisi Coates).
Music: 25 (Adele), "Uptown Funk" (Mark Ronson ft. Bruno Mars), To Pimp a Butterfly (Kendrick Lamar).
Iconic Context: "The Dress" (Blue/Black), Legalization of same-sex marriage (US).

Movies: Captain America: Civil War, Rogue One: A Star Wars Story, Deadpool.
Books: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child (Thorne/Rowling), The Underground Railroad (Colson Whitehead), It Ends with Us (Colleen Hoover - original release).
Music: Views (Drake), Lemonade (Beyoncé), "One Dance" (Drake).
Iconic Context: Pokémon GO, Brexit, Harambe.

Movies: Star Wars: The Last Jedi, Wonder Woman, Get Out, Beauty and the Beast.
Books: The Hate U Give (Angie Thomas), Origin (Dan Brown), Little Fires Everywhere (Celeste Ng).
Music: ÷ (Divide) (Ed Sheeran), "Shape of You" (Ed Sheeran), "Despacito" (Luis Fonsi ft. Daddy Yankee).
Iconic Context: #MeToo movement, Great American Solar Eclipse, Fyre Festival.

Movies: Avengers: Infinity War, Black Panther, Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse.
Books: Becoming (Michelle Obama), The President Is Missing (Bill Clinton/James Patterson), Circe (Madeline Miller).
Music: Scorpion (Drake), "God's Plan" (Drake), "Shallow" (Lady Gaga & Bradley Cooper).
Iconic Context: Thai Cave Rescue, Royal Wedding (Harry & Meghan).

Movies: Avengers: Endgame (highest-grossing of all time then), Joker, Parasite, The Lion King.
Books: The Testaments (Margaret Atwood), Where the Crawdads Sing (Delia Owens - peak year), Normal People (Sally Rooney).
Music: When We All Fall Asleep, Where Do We Go? (Billie Eilish), "Old Town Road" (Lil Nas X), Lover (Taylor Swift).
Iconic Context: Notre-Dame fire, Storm Area 51, "OK Boomer."

Movies: Bad Boys for Life (Top US gross), Tenet, Soul (Disney+), Demon Slayer: Mugen Train (Global).
Books: A Promised Land (Barack Obama), The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes (Suzanne Collins), The Midnight Library (Matt Haig).
Music: Folklore (Taylor Swift), After Hours (The Weeknd), "Blinding Lights" (The Weeknd).
Iconic Context: COVID-19, Tiger King, Black Lives Matter protests.

Movies: Spider-Man: No Way Home, Dune, No Time to Die.
Books: The Last Thing He Told Me (Laura Dave), Project Hail Mary (Andy Weir), The Hill We Climb (Amanda Gorman).
Music: Sour (Olivia Rodrigo), "Stay" (The Kid LAROI & Justin Bieber), "Drivers License" (Olivia Rodrigo).
Iconic Context: Suez Canal blockage (Ever Given), NFT mania, Jan 6th.

Movies: Top Gun: Maverick, Avatar: The Way of Water, Everything Everywhere All At Once.
Books: It Starts with Us (Colleen Hoover), Sea of Tranquility (Emily St. John Mandel), I'm Glad My Mom Died (Jennette McCurdy).
Music: Midnights (Taylor Swift), Un Verano Sin Ti (Bad Bunny), "As It Was" (Harry Styles).
Iconic Context: Wordle, The Will Smith Oscars Slap, Passing of Queen Elizabeth II.

Movies: Barbie, Oppenheimer, The Super Mario Bros. Movie.
Books: Spare (Prince Harry), Fourth Wing (Rebecca Yarros), Yellowface (R.F. Kuang).
Music: One Thing at a Time (Morgan Wallen), "Flowers" (Miley Cyrus), The Eras Tour (Live phenomenon).
Iconic Context: Titan Submersible, Twitter-to-X rebrand, "Roman Empire" meme.

Movies: Inside Out 2, Deadpool & Wolverine, Dune: Part Two.
Books: The Women (Kristin Hannah), Funny Story (Emily Henry), The Housemaid is Watching (Freida McFadden).
Music: The Tortured Poets Department (Taylor Swift), "Not Like Us" (Kendrick Lamar), "Espresso" (Sabrina Carpenter), Brat (Charli XCX).
Iconic Context: Paris Olympics, "Brat Summer," the "Coconut Tree" meme.
